user.title: Connect to Lumos Cloud
user.description: Enter your Lumos cloud credentials to connect to the WiSilica Lumos cloud.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Lumos
reauth_confirm.description: Your Lumos session has expired. Please enter your password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Lumos cloud. Check the Base URL and your network.

abort.already_configured: This Lumos account is already configured.
